question:
The present age of two persons are 36 and 50 years respectively. If after n years
the ratio of their age will be 3 : 4, then the value of n is :
दॉ व्यक्तिमों की ऱर्तभान आम ु क्रभलः 36 औय 50 ऱळत वै। मदद n ऱळों के फाद उनकी आमु का अनुऩार्
3 : 4 वॉगा, र्ॉ n का भान वै :
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The average age of a man and his son is 55 years. The ratio of their ages is 7 : 4,
respectively. What will be the ratio of their ages after 6 years?
एक व्यक्ति औय उऴके ऩत्रु की औऴर् आम ु 55 ऱळत वै। उनकी आमु का अनुऩार् क्रभलः 7 : 4 वै। 6 ऱळ त
फाद उनकी आमु का अनऩु ार् क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of the age of a father to that of his son is 7 : 4. If the product of their ages
(in years) is 1008, then what is the ratio of the age of the father to that of the son
after 10 years?
एक पऩर्ा की आम ु का उऴके ऩुत्र की आमु ऴे अनुऩार् 7: 4 वै। मदद उनकी आम ु का गुणनपर (ऱळों भें)
1008 वै, र्ॉ 10 ऱळत फाद पऩर्ा की आम ु का ऩुत्र की आम ु ऴे अनुऩार् क्या वै?
(DP CONSTABLE 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The sum of the reciprocals of the ages of two colleagues is nine times the
difference of the reciprocals of their ages. If the ratio of the products of their ages
to the sum of their ages is 100 : 9. Find their ages?
दॉ ऴवकर्भिमों की आमु के व्युत्क्रभों का मॉग उनकी आम ु के व्युत्क्रभों के अंर्य का नॊ गुना वै। मदद उनकी आम ु
के गुणनपर का उनकी आम ु के मॉग ऴ े अनुऩार् 100 : 9 वै। र्ॉ उनकी आम ु ज्ञार् कीर्जए ?
NTPC CBT - I 30/01/2021 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Nalini's younger brother is 12 years old. If the ratio of the age of Nalini to that of
her brother is 7 : 6, then what will be ratio in their ages 6 years hence?
नर्रनी का छॉटा बाई 12 ऱळत का वै। अगय नर्रनी औय उऴके बाई की आमु का अनुऩार् 7 : 6 वै, र्ॉ अफ
ऴे 6 ऱळत ऩश्चार् उनकी आमु का अनुऩार् पकर्ना वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
In the year 2000, Monu was 3 times his sister’s age. In 2010, he was 24 years older
than her. Find Monu’s age in 2010.
ऱळत 2000 भें, भॉनू की आम ु उऴकी फवन की आमु की 3 गुनी थी। 2010 भें, उऴकी आम ु उऴकी फवन
की आमु ऴ े 24 ऱळत अधधक थी। 2010 भें भॉनू की आम ु ज्ञार् कीर्जए।
Group D 23/08/2022 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Harsh was four times as old as Dev six years ago. How old is Dev today if Harsh
will be 40 years old 10 years later?
छव ऱळ त ऩवरे वळ त की उम्र देऱ ऴे चाय गुना थी। मदद 10 ऱळत फाद वळत 40 ऱळ त का वॉ जाएगा र्ॉ आज देऱ की
आम ु पकर्नी वै?
(IB ACIO 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Daya is 5 times as old as his son. Six years hence the sum of their ages will be 72
years. What is the present age of Daya’s son?
दमा की उम्र उऴके फेटे ऴे 5 गुना वै। छव ऱळत फाद उनकी आम ु का मॉग 72 ऱळत वॉगा। दमा के ऩुत्र की
ऱर्तभान आम ु क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Meenu is 38 years old. Her daughter is 8 years old. In how many years will Meenu
be double her daughter’s age?
भीनू की आमु 38 ऱळत वै। उऴकी ऩुत्री की आमु 8 ऱळत वै। पकर्ने ऱळो भें भीनू अऩनी ऩुत्री की आमु की
दॉगुनी वॉ जाएगी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pinaki is 9 years younger than Bhaswati. Thirteen years hence Bhaswati will be
1.2 times as old as Pinaki. Find Pinaki's present age.
पऩनाकी, बाऴऱर्ी ऴे 9 ऱळत छॉटी वै । र्ेयव ऱळों के फाद बाऴऱर्ी की आमु पऩनाकी की आम ु की 1.2
गुना वॉगी। पऩनाकी की ऱर्तभान आम ु ऩर्ा कय ें ?
RRB ALP 31/08/2018 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Rakhi is 20 years older than her daughter Shikha. In 6 years, Rakhi will be twice as
old as Shikha. Therefore, Rakhi’s present age is ____ years.
याखी अऩनी फेटी र्लखा ऴे 20 ऱळत फडी वैं। 6 ऱळत फाद याखी की आम ु र्लखा की आमु ऴे ऴ े दॉगुनी वॉ
जाएगी। इऴर्रए, याखी की ऱर्तभान आमु ____ ऱळत वै।
BY Gagan Pratap
(SSC SELECTION POST XI 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Ages of P, Q and R are in the ratio 4 : 7 : 9. 8 years ago, the age of R was Q's present
age. What is the sum of their ages at present?
P, Q औय R की आम ु 4 : 7 : 9 के अनुऩार् भें वैं। 8 ऱळत ऩवरे, R की आम,ु Q की ऱर्तभान आम ु के फयाफय
थी। ऱर्तभान भें उनकी आम ु का मॉग पकर्ना वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Priya's father was 38 years of age when she was born. Her mother was 36 when
her brother 4 years younger to her was born. How many years is her mother
younger than her father?
पिमा के जन्म के ऴभम उऴके पऩर्ा की आम ु 38 ऱळत थी। उनकी भां 36 ऴार की थीं जफ उनके 4 ऴार
छॉटे बाई का जन्म रृआ। उऴकी भााँ उऴके पऩर्ा ऴे पकर्ने ऱळ त छॉटी वै?
UP POLICE ASSISTANT OPERATOR 2024
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
My mother was 23 years old when I was born. 6 years later my sister was born
when my father's age was 34 years. What is the difference in the ages of my
parents?
जफ भेया जन्म रृआ र्फ भेयी भााँ 23 ऱळत की थीं। 6 ऴार फाद भेयी फवन का जन्म रृआ जफ भेय े पऩर्ा की
उम्र 34 ऴार थी. भेय े भार्ा-पऩर्ा की उम्र भें क्या अंर्य वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The sum of the present ages of Rajini and Veena is 65 years. At present,
Samantha is 5 years younger than Rajini. The respective ratio of the present
ages of Samantha and Veena is 7 : 8. What would Samantha's age be after 5
years?
यजनी औय ऱीना की ऱर्भत ान आम ु का मॉग 65 ऱळत वै। ऱर्तभान भें, ऴभांथा यजनी ऴे 5 ऴार छॉटी वैं।
ऴाभंथा औय ऱीना की ऱर्तभान आमु का अनुऩार् क्रभल: 7 : 8 वै। 5 ऱळत फाद ऴाभंथा की आम ु पकर्नी
वॉगी?
(SSC SELECTION POST 2022)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The sum of present ages of Ria and Abby is 48 years. Today Abby is 4 years older
than Shweta. The respective ratio of the present ages of Ria and Shweta is 4 : 7.
What was Abby’s age two years ago?
BY Gagan Pratap
रयमा औय एफी की ऱर्तभान आम ु का मॉग 48 ऱळत वै। आज एफी श्वेर्ा ऴे 4 ऴार फडा वै। रयमा औय श्वेर्ा
की ऱर्तभान आमु का अनुऩार् 4 : 7 वै। दॉ ऴार ऩवरे एफी की उम्र क्या थी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The sum of the ages of a son and father is 52 years; after four years the age of
the father will be four times that of the son. What is the present age ( in years) of
the son?
एक ऩुत्र औय पऩर्ा की आम ु का मॉग 52 ऱळत वै; चाय ऱळत फाद पऩर्ा की आम ु ऩुत्र की आम ु की चाय गुना
वॉ जामेगी। ऩुत्र की ऱर्तभान आम ु (ऱळों भें) क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The sum of the present ages of a father and his son is 94 years. 8 years ago their
respective ages were in the ratio of 2 : 1. After 10 years what will be the ratio of
ages of father and son?
एक पऩर्ा औय उऴके ऩुत्र की ऱर्तभान आमु का मॉग 94 ऱळत वै। 8 ऱळत ऩवरे उनकी क्रभलः
आमु का अनुऩार् 2: 1 था। 10 ऱळत फाद पऩर्ा औय ऩत्रु की आमु का अनुऩार् क्या वॉगा?
SSC CHSL TIER – I 2022
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The difference in the age of two people is 24 years. If 6 years ago, the older of the
two was four times as old as the younger one, then find their present ages.
दॉ व्यक्तिमों की आम ु भें 24 ऱळत का अंर्य वै। मदद 6 ऱळत ऩवरे, दॉनों भें ऴे फडे की आमु, छॉटे की आम ु की
चाय गुना थी, र्ॉ उनकी ऱर्तभान आम ु ज्ञार् कीर्जए।
[RRB JE 2024]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The current ages of Sudhir and Ashish are in the ratio 5 : 7. Twelve years ago, the
ratio of their ages was 1 : 2. What will be the age of Sudhir after five years from
now?
ऴुधीय औय आलीळ की ऱर्तभान आम ु का अनुऩार् 5:7 वै। फायव ऱळत ऩवरे, उनकी आम ु का अनुऩार् 1:2
था। अफ ऴ े ऩांच ऱळत फाद ऴुधीय की आमु क्या वॉगी?
SSC CGL 2023 PRE
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ages of A and B are in the ratio 4 : 7, respectively. After 8 years, the ratio of
their ages will be 2 : 3. What is the sum of the ages of A and B (in years)?
A औय B की आम ु का अनुऩार् क्रभलः 4 : 7 वै। 8 ऱळत फाद, उनकी आम ु का अनुऩार् 2:3 वॉगा। A औय B
BY Gagan Pratap
की आमु का मॉग (ऱळों भें) क्या वै?
(SSC SELECTION POST XII HIGHER SECONDARY LEVEL)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of the ages of two friends is 4 : 3 which will become 6 : 5 after 4 years.
What will be the sum of their ages (in years) after 22 years from now?
दॉ र्भत्रों की आमु का अनुऩार् 4 : 3 वै जॉ 4 ऱळत फाद 6 : 5 वॉ जामेगा। अफ ऴे 22 ऱळ त फाद उनकी आमु
का मॉग (ऱळत भें) पकर्ना वॉगा?
(SSC CGL MAINS 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
16 years ago, the age of the father was 4 times the age of his son. Now the father
is twice as old as his son. What is the difference between the present ages of the
father and his son?
16 ऱळत ऩूऱत, पऩर्ा की आमु उऴके ऩुत्र की आम ु की 4 गुनी थी। अफ पऩर्ा की आम ु अऩने ऩुत्र की आमु की
दगु ुनी वै। पऩर्ा औय उऴके ऩुत्र की ऱर्तभान आम ु के फीच पकर्ना अंर्य वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Four years ago, the ratio of the age of Ram to that of Shyam was 13 : 9. Eight years
from now, their ages will be in the ratio 4 : 3. The difference (in years) between
their present ages is :
चाय ऱळ त ऩवरे, याभ की आम ु का श्याभ की आम ु ऴे अनुऩार् 13 : 9 था। अफ ऴ े आठ ऱळत फाद उनकी आमु
का अनुऩार् 4 : 3 वॉगा। उनकी ऱर्तभान आम ु के फीच का अंर्य (ऱळों भें) वै :
RRB NTPC 08/04/2021 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Twelve years ago, the age of Reena's mother was three times the age of Reena.
Two years hence, the mother's age will be 2 times the age of Reena. Find the ratio
of the present ages of Reena and her mother.
फायव ऱळ त ऩवरे, यीना की भााँ की आम ु यीना की आमु ऴे र्ीन गुना थी। दॉ ऱळत फाद, भााँ की आम ु यीना की
आम ु ऴे 2 गुना वॉ जाएगी। यीना औय उऴकी भााँ की ऱर्तभान आम ु का अनुऩार् ज्ञार् कीर्जए।
[RRB JE 2024]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If the present ages of X and Y is 4 : 7, respectively. After 5 years, the ratio will
change to 5 : 8. The present age of Y (in years) is:
BY Gagan Pratap
X औय Y की ऱर्तभान आमु का अनुऩार् क्रभलः 4: 7 वै। 5 ऱळों के फाद, अनुऩार् 5:8 वॉ जाएगा। Y की
ऱर्तभान आमु (ऱळों भें) ज्ञार् कय।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Five years ago X was three times as old as Y and ten years hence, X will be twice
as old as Y. What is the present age of X?
ऩांच ऱळ त ऩवरे X की आमु Y की आम ु ऴ े र्ीन गुनी थी औय दऴ ऱळत फाद, X की आमु Y की आम ु ऴ े दॉ
गुनी वॉ जाएगी। X की ऱर्तभान आमु क्या वै?
ALP Tier II 21/01/2019 (Afternoon)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Mother told her daughter, “Seven years ago, I was seven times as old as you
were then, Also, three years from now, I shall be three times as old as you will be”.
Find the present ages of the mother and the daughter, respectively.
भााँ ने अऩनी ऩुत्री ऴ े कवा, “ऴार् ऴार ऩवरे, भेयी आम ु र्ुम्हायी र्फ की आमु की ऴार् गुना थी औय अफ
ऴे र्ीन ऱळ त फाद भेयी आमु र्ुम्हायी र्फ की आम ु की र्ीन गुनी वॉ जाएगी। भााँ औय ऩुत्री की क्रभलः
ऱर्तभान आम ु ज्ञार् कीर्जए।
SSC CGL 2023 PRE
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
5 years ago, Rohan's father's age was 8 times Rohan's age. After 5 years the ratio
of Rohan's father's age to Rohan's age will be 10 : 3. What is the present age of
Rohan?
5 ऱळ त ऩवरे, यॉवन के पऩर्ा की आम ु , यॉवन की आम ु की 8 गुनी थी। 5 ऱळत फाद यॉवन के पऩर्ा की आमु
औय यॉवन की आम ु का अनुऩार् 10 : 3 वॉगा। यॉवन की ऱर्तभान आम ु क्या वै?
ALP Tier II 21/01/2019 (Afternoon)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of the ages of A and B is 3 : 4. Four years ago, the ratio of their ages was
5 : 7. What will be the ratio of the ages of A and B four years from now?
A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार् 3 : 4 वैं चाय ऱळत ऩऱू त, उनकी आम ु का अनुऩार् 5:7 था। आज ऴे चाय ऱळत
फाद A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार् क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The difference between Peter and Preeti's ages is 5 years. When they married
each other 35 years ago, 4 times Peter's age was the same as 5 times the age of
Preeti. What is the current sum of their ages?
BY Gagan Pratap
ऩीटय औय िीर्ी के उम्रों भें 5 ऱळत का अंर्य वै। 35 ऱळत ऩवरे जफ दॉनों का पऱऱाव रृआ था उऴ ऴभम ऩीटय
के उम्र का चाय गुना, िीर्ी के उम्र के 5 गुने के फयाफय था। ऱर्तभान भें दॉनों के उम्रों का मॉग क्या वै ?
RRB ALP 13/08/2018 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Eight years ago, the ratio of ages of A and B was 5: 4. The ratio of their present
ages is 6: 5. What will be the sum (in years) of the ages of A and B after 7 years
from now?
आठ ऱळ त ऩवरे, A औय B की आम ु का अनुऩार् 5 : 4 था। उनकी ऱर्तभान आमु का अनुऩार् 6 : 5 वै। अफ
ऴे 7 ऱळ त फाद, A औय B की आम ु का मॉग (ऱळों भें) पकर्ना वॉगा?
SSC CGL MAINS 2020
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Eight years ago, the ratio of ages of A and B was 5: 4. The ratio of their present
ages is 6: 5. What will be the sum (in years) of the ages of A and B after 7 years
from now?
आठ ऱळ त ऩवरे, A औय B की आम ु का अनुऩार् 5 : 4 था। उनकी ऱर्तभान आमु का अनुऩार् 6 : 5 वै। अफ
ऴे 7 ऱळ त फाद, A औय B की आम ु का मॉग (ऱळों भें) पकर्ना वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of the ages of A and B, four years ago, was 4 : 5. Eight years hence, the
ratio of the ages of A and B will be 11 : 13. What is the ratio of their present ages?
चाय ऱळत ऩवरे, A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार् 4 : 5 था। आठ ऱळत के फाद, A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार्
11 : 13 वॉगा। उनकी ऱर्तभान आमु का अनुऩार् ज्ञार् कय।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Four years ago, the ratio of the ages of A and B was 3 : 5. Six years hence, the ratio
of the ages of A and B will be 2 : 3. What is the sum (in years) of the present ages
of A and B?
चाय ऱळत ऩूऱत, A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार् 3: 5 था। छः ऱळत फाद, A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार् 2: 3
वॉगा। A औय B की ऱर्तभान आमु का मॉग (ऱळत भ)ें क्या वॉगा?
चाय ऱळत ऩूऱ,त A औय B की आम ु का अनुऩार् 3: 5 था। छः ऱळत फाद, A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार् 2:3
वॉगा। A औय B की ऱर्तभान आमु का मॉग (ऱळत भ)ें क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Seven years ago, the ratio of the ages of A and B was 2 : 7. The ratio of their
present ages is 3 : 8. What will be the ratio of the ages of A and B, four years from
now?
ऴार् ऱळत ऩवरे, A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार् 2: 7 था। उनकी ऱर्तभान आमु का अनुऩार् 3:8 वै। अफ ऴे
चाय ऱळत फाद A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार् क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Seven years ago, the ages (in years) of A and B were in the ratio 4 : 5 and 7 years
hence, their ages will be in the ratio 5 : 6. What will be the ratio of their ages 5
years from now?
ऴार् ऱळत ऩवरे, A औय B की आमु ( ऱळो भें) का अनुऩार् 4 : 5 था औय आज ऴे 7 ऱळत फाद उनकी आम ु
का अनुऩार् 5 : 6 वॉ जामेगा। अफ ऴे 5 ऱळत फाद उनकी आमु का अनुऩार् क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Meena married 10 years ago. Today her age is 7/5 times her age at the time of her
marriage. Her daughter age is 1/5 of her age. What is the ratio of Meena’s age to
her daughter age after 5 years?
भीना न े 10 ऴार ऩवरे लादी की थी। आज उऴकी उम्र उऴकी लादी के ऴभम उऴकी उम्र ऴे 7/5 गुना वै।
उऴकी फेटी की उम्र उऴकी उम्र की 1/5 वै। 5 ऱळत के फाद भीना की आम ु का उऴकी ऩुत्री की आम ु ऴे
अनुऩार् क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of the ages of A and B, 8 years ago, was 5 : 7. The ratio of their ages, 8
years from now, will be 9 : 11. If the present age of C is 13 years less than that of B,
and the present age of D is 8 years less than that of the age of A, then the sum of
the present ages of C and D, in years, is:
8 ऱळत ऩूऱत A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार् 5:7 था। अफ ऴे 8 ऱळत फाद उनकी आमु का अनुऩार् 9:11 वॉगा।
मदद C की ऱर्तभान आमु B की आमु ऴे 13 ऱळत कभ वै, औय D की ऱर्तभान आमु A की आमु ऴे 8 ऱळत कभ
वै, र्ॉ C औय D की ऱर्तभान आमु का मॉग, ऱळों भें वै-
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of present ages of A and B is 7 : 8. After 6 years from now, the ratio of
their ages will be 8 : 9. If C's present age is 10 years more than the present age of
A, then the present age (in years) of C is:
A औय B की ऱर्तभान आमु का अनुऩार् 7 : 8 वै। अफ ऴे छव ऱळत फाद, उनकी आमु का अनुऩार् 8 :9
वॉगा। मदद C की ऱर्तभान आमु, A की ऱर्तभान आमु ऴे 10 ऱळत अधधक वै, र्ॉ C की ऱर्तभान आमु (ऱळत
भें) ज्ञार् कय।ें
BY Gagan Pratap
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of the ages of A and B, 3 years ago, was 5 : 7. The ratio of their ages, 13
years from now, will be 9 : 11. If the present age of C is 11 years less than that of B,
then the present age of C, in years, is:
3 ऱळत ऩवरे A औय B की आमु का अनुऩार् 5:7 था। अफ ऴे 13 ऱळत फाद उनकी आम ु का अनुऩार् 9:11
वॉगा। मदद C की ऱर्तभान आमु उऴऴ े 11 ऱळत कभ वै B की, र्ॉ C की ऱर्तभान आमु, ऱळों भें, वै:
(SSC CGL 2024 Pre)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The age of a father will be double the age of his son ten years later. 10 years ago,
the father’s age was six times the age of the son. How many years from now, the
ratio of their ages will be 3 : 2?
दऴ ऴार फाद एक पऩर्ा की उम्र उऴके फेटे की उम्र ऴे दॉगुनी वॉ जाएगी। 10 ऴार ऩवरे, पऩर्ा की उम्र
फेटे की उम्र ऴ े छः गुना थी। अफ ऴे पकर्ने ऱळ त फाद उनकी आमुका अनुऩार् 3 : 2 वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Ram is 20 years older than Rahul. 'n' years ago Ram was thrice as old as Rahul.
'2n' years from now the ratio of the ages of Ram and Rahul will be 15 : 11. What is
the value of 'n'?
याभ, यारृर ऴे 20 ऱळत फडा वै। 'n' ऱळ त ऩवरे याभ की आम,ु यारृर की आम ु ऴे र्ीन गुना थी। अफ ऴे '2n'
ऱळत फाद याभ औय यारृर की आमु का अनुऩार् 15 : 11 वॉगा । ‘n' का भान ज्ञार् कय।ें
SSC CHSL PRE 2024
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of the age of a man and his wife is 4 : 3. After 4 years, this ratio will be 9 : 7. If at
the time of the marriage the ratio was 5 : 3, then how many years ago did they marry?
एक ऩुरुळ औय उऴकी ऩत्नी की आम ु का अनुऩार् 4 : 3 वै। 4 ऱळत फाद मव अनुऩार् 9 : 7 वॉ जाएगा। मदद पऱऱाव के
ऴभम मव अनुऩार् 5:3 था, र्ॉ पकर्न े ऱळ त ऩवरे पऱऱाव रृआ था?
UP POLICE ASSISTANT OPERATOR 2024
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Amit’s father is aged five times more than Amit. After 6 years, he would be three
and a half times of Amit’s age. After further 9 years, how many times of Amit’s
age would he be?
अर्भर् के पऩर्ा की आम ु अर्भर् ऴे ऩााँच गुना अधधक वै। 6 ऴार फाद, ऱव अर्भर् की उम्र का ऴाढे र्ीन
गुना वॉगा। अगरे 9 ऱळों के फाद, उऴकी आम ु अर्भर् की आम ु की पकर्नी गुनी वॉगी?
BY Gagan Pratap
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
P got married 15 years ago. Today her age is times her age at the time of her
marriage. At present her son's age is of her age. What was her son's age 4 years
ago as a fraction of P's age at that time?
P की लादी 15 ऴार ऩवरे रृई थी। आज उऴकी उम्र उऴकी लादी के ऴभम की उम्र ऴ े गुना वै।
ऱर्तभान भें उऴके फेटे की उम्र उऴकी उम्र के फयाफय वै। 4 ऴार ऩवरे उऴके फेटे की उम्र P की उऴ ऴभम
की उम्र के अंल के रूऩ भें क्या थी?
SSC CHSL PRE 2024
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
When Rajesh’age was same as the present age of Garima, the ratio of their ages
was 3:2. When Garima’s age becomes the same as the present age of Rajesh, the
ratio of the ages of Rajesh and Garima will become?
जफ याजेल की उम्र, गरयभा की ऱर्तभान उम्र के ऴभान थी, र्ॉ उनकी उम्र का अनुऩार् 3 : 2 था। जफ
गरयभा की उम्र, याजेल की ऱर्तभान उम्र के फयाफय वॉ जार्ी वै, र्ॉ याजेल औय गरयभा की उम्र का
अनुऩार् क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If 10 : 13 is the ratio of present age of A and B respectively and 8:15 is the ratio
between A’s age 10 years ago and B’s age 10 years hence. Then what will be the
ratio of A’s age 10 years hence and B’s age 10 years ago?
मदद 10 : 13 क्रभलः A औय B की ऱर्तभान आमु का अनुऩार् वै। 10 ऴार ऩवरे A की उम्र औय 10 ऴार
फाद B की उम्र का अनुऩार् 8 : 15 का वै। पपय A की आम ु के 10 ऱळत औय B की आम ु के 10 ऱळ त ऩवरे का
अनुऩार् क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio between the present ages of P and Q is 7 : 5, respectively. The ratio
between P's age 5 years ago and Q's age 5 years hence is 1 : 1. What is the ratio
between P's age 5 years hence and Q's age 5 years ago?
P औय Q की ऱर्तभान आमु के फीच क्रभलः 7 : 5 का अनुऩार् वै। 5 ऱळ त ऩवरे P की उम्र औय 5 ऱळ त फाद Q
की उम्र के फीच का अनुऩार् 1:1 वै। 5 ऱळत फाद P की उम्र औय 5 ऱळत ऩवरे Q की उम्र के फीच का अनुऩार्
क्या वै?
Group D 26/08/2022 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of present ages of A to that of B is 7:3. 4 years ago, the ratio of A’s age to
that of B’s after 4 years is 2:1. Find the difference between the age of A after 4
years and age of B 4 years ago?
A की ऱर्तभान आम ु का B की ऱर्तभान आम ु ऴे अनुऩार् 7 : 3 वै। 4 ऱळत ऩवरे, A की आम ु का B की आम ु
ऴे 4 ऱळ त फाद का अनुऩार् 2 : 1 वै। 4 ऱळत फाद A की आम ु औय 4 ऱळ त ऩवरे B की आम ु के भध्य का अंर्य
ज्ञार् कीर्जम?े
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of a man's age to his father's age is 4 : 5 and the ratio of his age to his son's age
is 6 : 1. Four years ago these ratios were 11 : 14 and 11 : 1 , respectively. The ratio of the age
of the grandfather to that of the grandson 12 years from now will be:
एक व्यक्ति औय उऴके पऩर्ा की आम ु का अनुऩार् 4 : 5 वै औय उऴ व्यक्ति औय उऴके ऩुत्र की आम ु का
अनुऩार् 6 : 1 वै। चाय ऱळत ऩवरे म े अनुऩार् क्रभल. 11 : 14 औय 11 : 1 थे। र्ॉ अफ ऴे 12 ऱळत फाद दादा औय
ऩॉर्ा की आम ु का अनुऩार् क्या वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ratio of ages of father and mother was 11 : 10 when their son was born. The
ratio of ages of father and mother will 19 : 18 when the son will be twice his
present age, what is the ratio of present ages of father and mother ?
पऩर्ा औय भााँ की उम्र का अनुऩार् 11 : 10 था | जफ उनके फेटे का जन्म रृआ था | पऩर्ा औय भााँ की उम्र
का अनुऩार् 19 : 18 वॉगा | जफ ऩुत्र की आम ु अऩने ऱर्तभान आम ु ऴ े दॉगुनी वॉ जाएगी | पऩर्ा औय भााँ के
ऱर्तभान आम ु का क्या अनुऩार् वै|
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
In a family, the father's age is 5 times the age of one of his sons. Mother's age is 4
times the age of their other son. Difference in the parents' ages is half the sum of
the sons' ages. Then:
एक ऩरयऱाय भें, पऩर्ा की आम ु उऴके एक फेटे की आम ु का 5 गुना वै। भााँ की आमु उऴके दऴू य े फेटे की
आम ु का 4 गुनी वै। भार्ा-पऩर्ा की आम ु का अंर्य, फेटों की आम ु के मॉग के आधा वै। र्ॉ :
RRB JE 02/06/2019 (Evening)
options: They are twins / ऱे जुडऱा ं वैं।
The difference in their ages is 5 / उनकी उम्र का अंर्य 5 वै।
One son is twice as old as the other / एक फेटे की आमु दऴू य े की र्ुरना भें दॉगुनी वै।
The sum of t-their ages is a multiple of 5 / उनकी आमु का मॉग 5 ऴे अधधक वै।
answer: They are twins / ऱे जुडऱा ं वैं।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
One year ago, a man was 7 times as old as his daughter. Now his age is equal to
the square of his daughter's age. If the daughter has already celebrated her first
year birthday, then their present ages are:
BY Gagan Pratap
एक ऱळ त ऩवरे, एक आदभी की आम ु उऴकी ऩुत्री की आम ु की 7 गुनी थी। अफ उऴकी आम,ु उऴकी ऩुत्री
की आम ु के ऱग त के फयाफय वै। मदद ऩुत्री की आम ु एक ऱळत ऴ े अधधक वॉ चुकी वै, र्ॉ उनकी ऱर्तभान आमु
ज्ञार् कीर्जए ।
Group D 08/09/2022 ( Evening )
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Krish is 5 years younger than Parthiv. Eight years ago three times the age of
Krish was 10 more than twice the age of Parthiv. Find Krish's present age.
पक्रल, ऩाक्तथिऱ ऴे 5 ऱळत छॉटा वै। 8 ऱळत ऩवरे पक्रल के उम्र का र्ीन गुना ऩाक्तथिऱ के उम्र के दॉगुने ऴे 10
ऱळत ज्यादा था। पक्रल की ऱर्तभान उम्र क्या वै?
RRB ALP 10/08/2018 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three years from now Dharitri's age will be eight years less than twice Eunice's
age. The sum of their present ages is 61 years. What is Dharitri's present age?
अफ ऴे र्ीन ऱळ त फाद, धरयत्री की आमु, मुनीऴ की आम ु के दॉगुना ऴ े आठ ऱळत कभ वॉगी । इन दॉनों की
ऱर्तभान आम ु का मॉग 61 ऱळत वै। धरयत्री की ऱर्तभान आमु पकर्नी वै?
RRB ALP 09/08/2018 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If 5 times a son's age is added to his father's age, the sum is 42 years. If 2.8 times
the father's age is added to the son's age, the sum is 76 years. What is the
father's age (in years)?
मदद एक पऩर्ा की आम ु भ ें उऴके ऩुत्र की आम ु का 5 गुना जॉडा जाए, र्ॉ मॉग 42 ऱळत वॉर्ा वै। मदद पऩर्ा
की आम ु का 2.8 गुना, उऴके ऩुत्र की आमु भें जॉडा जाए, र्ॉ मॉग 76 ऱळत वॉर्ा वै। पऩर्ा की आम ु (ऱळत भ)ें
ज्ञार् कीर्जए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If twice the son's age (in years) is added to the age of his father, the sum is 91. If
twice the age (in years) of father is added to the age of the son, the sum is 119.
What is the difference (in years) between the ages of father and son?
मदद ऩुत्र की आम ु का दॉगुना (ऱळों भें) उऴके पऩर्ा की आमु भें जॉडा जार्ा वै, र्ॉ मॉगपर 91 वॉर्ा वै।
मदद पऩर्ा की आम ु का दॉगुना (ऱळों भें) ऩुत्र की आमु भें जॉडा जार्ा वै, र्ॉ मॉगपर 119 वै। पऩर्ा औय
ऩुत्र की आमु के फीच अंर्य (ऱळों भें) पकर्ना वै?
(DELHI HEAD CONSTABLE 2022)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Suman’s age, one year hereafter, will be 3 years less than twice the present age
of Sangeeta. After 6 years from now, Sangeeta’s age will be equal to 2/3rd of
Suman’s age at that time. What is the sum of present age (in years) of Suman
and Sangeeta?
ऴुभन की आम,ु एक ऱळत फाद, ऴंगीर्ा की ऱर्तभान आम ु के दॉगुने ऴे 3 ऱळत कभ वॉगी। अफ ऴे 6 ऱळत फाद,
ऴंगीर्ा की आमु उऴ ऴभम ऴुभन की आम ु के 2/3 के फयाफय वॉगी। ऴभु न औय ऴंगीर्ा की ऱर्भत ान
आम ु (ऱळों भें) का मॉग क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The sum of two times the present age of A and three times the present age of B is 106
years. Four times the present age of B exceeds three times the present age of A by 11
years. What will be the sum of the ages (in years) of A and B, 4 years from now?
A की ऱर्तभान आम ु के दॉ गुने, औय B की ऱर्तभान आम ु के र्ीन गुने का मॉग 106 ऱळत वै। B की ऱर्तभान
आम ु का चाय गुना, A की ऱर्तभान आम ु के र्ीन गनु े ऴे 11 ऱळत अधधक वै। अफ ऴ े 4 ऱळत फाद, A औय B की
आम ु का मॉग (ऱळत भें) पकर्ना वॉगा?
Group D 01/09/2022 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The sum of 6 times the present age of A and 4 times the present age of B is 156
years. 2 times the present age of B exceeds 9 times the present age of A by 30
years. What will be the sum of the ages (in years) of A and B, 9 years from now?
A की ऱर्तभान आम ु के 6 गुने औय B की ऱर्तभान आमु के 4 गुने का मॉग 156 ऱळत वै। B की ऱर्भत ान
आम ु का 2 गुना, A की ऱर्तभान आम ु के 9 गुने ऴे 30 ऱळत अधधक वै। अफ ऴे 9 ऱळ त फाद, A औय B की आमु
का मॉग (ऱळत भें) पकर्ना वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Four times P’s present age exceeds Q’s present age by 41 years. After 10 years,
three times Q’s age will be 33 years less than seven times P’s age at that time.
What is Q’s present age?
P की ऱर्तभान आम ु का चाय गुना, Q की ऱर्तभान आमु ऴे 41 ऱळत अधधक वै। 10 ऱळत फाद, Q की आम ु का
र्ीन गुना, उऴ ऴभम P की आम ु के ऴार् गुना ऴे 33 ऱळत कभ वॉगा। Q की ऱर्तभान आम ु (ऱळों भें) ज्ञार्
कीर्जए।
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two times the present age (in years) of Rahul is equal to the age bof Savitri (in
years) after 9 years from now. After 19 years from now, 3/7 of Savitri’s age (in
years) will be equal to Rani’s present age (in years). What will be Rani’s age (in
years) after 9 years from now?
यारृर की ऱर्तभान आम ु (ऱळों भें) का दॉगुना, अफ ऴे 9 ऱळत फाद ऴापऱत्री की आम ु (ऱळों भें) के फयाफय वै।
अफ ऴे 19 ऱळत फाद, ऴापऱत्री की आम ु का 3/7 (ऱळों भें) यानी की ऱर्तभान आमु (ऱळों भें) के फयाफय वॉगी।
अफ ऴे 9 ऱळत फाद यानी की आम ु (ऱळों भ)ें क्या वॉगी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The sum of the present ages of a father and his son is 19 years more than 2 times
the present age of the son. After 15 years, 12 times the father's age will be 17 years
less than 13 times the son's age. The difference (in years) between the present
ages of the father and the son is:
एक पऩर्ा औय उऴके ऩुत्र की ऱर्तभान आम ु का मॉग, ऩुत्र की ऱर्तभान आम ु के 2 गुने ऴे 19 ऱळत अधधक
वै। 15 ऱळ त फाद, पऩर्ा की आम ु का 12 गुना ऩुत्र की आम ु के 13 गुने ऴे 17 ऱळत कभ वॉगा। पऩर्ा औय ऩुत्र की
ऱर्तभान आम ु के फीच अंर्य (ऱळत भें) पकर्ना वै?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If 2 times Mary's present age is 27 years more than 5 times Dia's present age, and
7 times Dia's present age is 9 years less than Mary's present age, then what is the
difference (in years) between the ages of Mary and Dia?
मदद भैयी की ऱर्तभान आमु का 2 गुना, दीमा की ऱर्तभान आम ु के 5 गुने ऴे 27 ऱळ त अधधक वै, औय दीमा
की ऱर्तभान आम ु का 7 गनु ा, भैयी की ऱर्तभान आमु ऴे 9 ऱळ त कभ वै, र्ॉ भैयी औय दीमा की आमु के फीच
का अंर्य (ऱळों भें) पकर्ना वै?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
6 years ago, the age of a father was 34 years more than twice his son's age. After
how many years, from now, will he be twice his son's age?
6 ऱळ त ऩवरे, एक पऩर्ा की आम ु उऴके ऩुत्र की आमु के दॉगुने ऴे 34 ऱळ त अधधक थी। अफ ऴे पकर्ने ऱळों
फाद, उऴकी आमु उऴके ऩुत्र की आम ु की दॉगुनी वॉ जाएगी?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three times the present age of Sujata is 5 years more than two times the present
age of Vanita. After 3 years, three times the age of Vanita will be 4 years less
BY Gagan Pratap
than four times the age of Sujatha. The age of Vanita is k years more than that of
Sujatha. What is the value of k?
ऴुजार्ा की ऱर्तभान आमु का र्ीन गुना, ऱर्नर्ा की ऱर्तभान आम ु के दॉ गुने ऴे 5 ऱळत अधधक वै। 3 ऱळ त
फाद, ऱर्नर्ा की आम ु का र्ीन गुना, ऴुजार्ा की आम ु के चाय गुने ऴे 4 ऱळत कभ वॉगा। ऱर्नर्ा की आम,ु
ऴुजार्ा ऴे k ऱळत की आम ु अधधक वै। K का भान ज्ञार् कीर्जए ।
RRB NTPC 25/01/2021 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If 3 times the mother's present age is 36 years more than 5 times her daughter's
age, and 3 times the daughter's age is 4 years less than the mother's age, then
what is the difference (in years) between the present ages of the mother and the
daughter?
मदद भार्ा की ऱर्तभान आम ु का 3 गुना उऴकी ऩुत्री की आम ु के 5 गुन े ऴे 36 ऱळत अधधक वै, औय ऩुत्री
की आम ु का 3 गुना भार्ा की आम ु ऴ े 4 ऱळत कभ वै, र्ॉ भार्ा औय ऩुत्री की ऱर्तभान आमु के फीच अंर्य
(ऱळत भें) पकर्ना वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
7 times the present age of X is 6 years less than 2 times the present age of Y. At
present, P is 7 times as old as X, and Y is 6 years younger than Q. If P is 70 years
older than Q, then the present age (in years) of Y is:
X की ऱर्तभान आम ु का 7 गुना, Y की ऱर्तभान आमु के 2 गुन े ऴ े 6 ऱळत कभ वै। ऱर्तभान भें, P की आमु X
की आम ु की 7 गुनी वै, औय Y, Q ऴे 6 ऱळ त छॉटा वै। मदद P, Q ऴे 70 ऱळत फडा वै, र्ॉ Y की ऱर्तभान आमु
(ऱळत भें) ज्ञार् कीर्जए।
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The sum of two times Manavi's present age and Tanvi's present age is 35 years.
Tanvi's father is presently three times as old as Tanvi. Manavi's brother's present
age is 6 years more than Manavi's present age. The sum of the present ages of
Tanvi's father and Manavi's brother is 56 years. What is the sum of the present
ages (in years) of Manavi and Tanvi?
भानऱी की ऱर्तभान आम ु के दॉ गुने औय र्न्वी की ऱर्तभान आमु का मॉग 35 ऱळत वै। र्न्वी के पऩर्ा की
आम,ु ऱर्तभान भें र्न्वी की आम ु की र्ीन गुनी वै। भानऱी के बाई की ऱर्तभान आमु, भानऱी की
ऱर्तभान आम ु ऴ े 6 ऱळत अधधक वै। र्न्वी के पऩर्ा औय भानऱी के बाई की ऱर्तभान आम ु का मॉग 56 ऱळत
वै। भानऱी औय र्न्वी की ऱर्तभान आम ु का मॉग (ऱळत भें) ज्ञार् कीर्जए।
Group D 09/09/2022 (Evening)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The ages of two friends, Ram and Ravi, differ by 7 years. Ram’s mother Mayadevi
is three times as old as Ram, and Ravi is four times as old as his brother Soham.
The ages of Mayadevi and Soham differ by 65 years. Find the age of Mayadevi (in
years).
दॉ दॉस्तों, याभ औय यपऱ की उम्र भें 7 ऴार का अंर्य वै। याभ की भााँ भामादेऱी की उम्र याभ ऴे र्ीन गुना
वै, औय यपऱ की उम्र उऴके बाई ऴॉवभ ऴे चाय गनु ा वै। भामादेऱी औय ऴॉवभ की उम्र भें 65 ऱळत का अंर्य
वै। भामादेऱी की आम ु (ऱळों भें) ज्ञार् कीर्जए।
(SSC CGL 2024 Pre)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The age of Vanraj is thrice the age of his son. The age of his daughter is 3 years
less than the age of his son. If 3 years ago the sum of the ages of these three was
63 years, then find the present age (in years) of Vanraj.
ऱनयाज की आम ु उऴके ऩुत्र की आम ु की र्ीन गनु ी वै। उऴकी ऩुत्री की आमु उऴके ऩुत्र की आम ु ऴे 3 ऱळत
कभ वै। मदद 3 ऱळत ऩूऱत इन र्ीनों की आम ु का मॉग 63 ऱळत था, र्ॉ ऱनयाज की ऱर्तभान आम ु (ऱळत भ)ें
ज्ञार् कीर्जए।
Group D 22/09/2022 (Afternoon)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
In a family, the combined age husband, wife and a son is 90 years. The husband
is the oldest. The difference in the ages of the husband and wife is 1/3rd the age of
their son. After 10 years, the age of the son would be half the age of his father.
What is the present age of his mother (in years)?
एक ऩरयऱाय भ ें ऩधर्, ऩत्नी औय एक फेटे की ऴंमुि आम ु 90 ऱळत वै। ऩधर् ऴफऴे फडा वै. ऩधर् औय ऩत्नी की
उम्र भें अंर्य उनके फेटे की उम्र का 1/3 वै। 10 ऱळत फाद ऩुत्र की आम ु उऴके पऩर्ा की आम ु की आधी वॉगी।
उऴकी भााँ की ऱर्तभान आम ु (ऱळों भें) क्या वै?
(SSC CGL 2024 Pre)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A father said to his son, "I was as old as you are at the time of your birth. If the
present age of the father is 40 years, then what was the age of the son 5 years
ago?" ,
एक पऩर्ा न े अऩने फेटे ऴे कवा, "भैं र्ुम्हाय े जन्म के ऴभम इऴ ऴभम की र्ुम्हायी उम्र के फयाफय था। मदद
पऩर्ा की ऱर्तभान आम ु 40 ऱळत वै, र्ॉ 5 ऱळ त ऩवरे ऩुत्र की आमु क्या थी?"
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A says, “If you reverse my own age, the figures represent my Brother’s age. He is,
of course, senior to me and the difference between our ages is one-eleventh of
their sum.” Then A’s brother’s age is?
A कवर्ा वै, "मदद आऩ भेयी स्वम ं की आम ु कॉ उरट देर्े वैं, र्ॉ आंकडे भेय े बाई की आमु का िधर्र्नधधत्व
कयर् े वैं। ऱव र्नर्श्चर् रूऩ ऴे भुझऴे ऱरयष्ठ वै औय वभायी उम्र के फीच का अंर्य वभायी उम्रों के मॉग का
एक-ग्यायवऱााँ वै। "र्ॉ A के बाई की आम ु क्या वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A father said to his son, “n years back I was as old as you are now. My present
age is four times your age n years back.” If the sum of present ages of the father
and the son is 130 years, what is the difference of their ages?
एक पऩर्ा न े अऩने फेटे ऴे कवा, “n ऱळों ऩवरे भैं उर्ना वी उम्र का था र्जर्ना अफ र्ुभ वॉ। भेयी ऱर्भत ान
आम ु n ऱळत ऩवरे की आऩकी आम ु ऴे चाय गुना वै।” मदद पऩर्ा औय ऩुत्र की ऱर्तभान आमु का मॉग 130
ऱळत वै, र्ॉ उनकी आम ु का अंर्य क्या वै?
(UPSC CSAT 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].
